\section{Reproducibility Manifest}
\label{app:repro}

This appendix records a minimal reproduction recipe: exact commands, data locations, and a pinned repository state.
The manifest lists the minimal set of commands/outputs needed to reproduce the main claims; additional exploratory reports referenced in the text are not required unless explicitly listed here.
Run \path{PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/generate_repro_manifest.py} to refresh this manifest.

\paragraph{Repository state.}
Commit: \texttt{6db311e} (full: \texttt{6db311e65c1bea51cb6f126709d619630c4532eb}); branch: \texttt{main}; dirty: \texttt{true}.

\paragraph{Environment.}
Python: \path{3.12.8 | packaged by Anaconda, Inc. | (main, Dec 11 2024, 16:31:09) [GCC 11.2.0]}.
Platform: \path{Linux-6.6.87.2-microsoft-standard-WSL2-x86_64-with-glibc2.39}.
Packages: \texttt{numpy}={1.26.4}, \texttt{scipy}={1.14.1}, \texttt{torch}={2.2.2+cpu}, \texttt{matplotlib}={3.10.0}.

\paragraph{Datasets.}
Paths below are the expected on-disk locations used by the scripts in this repository. Large outputs under \path{runs/} and \path{reports/} are not tracked.
\begin{itemize}[nosep]
  \item \textbf{Brain-* k-Wave pilots (simulated IQ)}: Labeled low-FPR ROC + ablations.
    \\ Local: \path{runs/pilot/}.
    \\ Source: generated locally via sim/kwave/pilot\_motion.py (Makefile targets r4c-*).
  \item \textbf{Mace/Urban whole-brain mouse fUS (PD-only)}: PD-only telemetry + hold-out alias-gate evaluation (no Doppler IQ).
    \\ Local: \path{data/whole-brain-fUS}.
    \\ Source: \path{https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.4905862}.
  \item \textbf{Shin RatBrain Fig3 (LOCA-ULM) beamformed IQ}: Real-IQ ingestion, telemetry, contract + label-free robustness sweeps.
    \\ Local archive: \path{data/shin_zenodo_10711806/RatBrain_Fig3.zip}.
    \\ Extracts to: \path{data/shin_zenodo_10711806/ratbrain_fig3_raw}.
    \\ Source: \path{https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10711806}.
  \item \textbf{Twinkling artifact dataset (RawBCF phantoms)}: Structurally labeled phantom ROC (Gammex) + within-ensemble motion ladders + KA hygiene (calculi).
    \\ Local: \path{data/twinkling_artifact/}.
    \\ Source: \path{https://doi.org/10.17816/DD76511}.
  \item \textbf{ULM Zenodo 7883227 (rat brain kHz IQ)}: Label-free motion robustness + one-time baseline calibration sweep.
    \\ Local archive: \path{data/ulm_zenodo_7883227/IQ_001_to_025.zip}.
    \\ Extracts to: \path{tmp/ulm_zenodo_7883227/}.
    \\ Source: \path{https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7883227}.
\end{itemize}

\paragraph{Pre-registered selections used in this manuscript.}
\begin{itemize}[nosep]
  \item \textbf{Brain seed sweep (AliasContract pilot)}: seed2-seed12 (n=11).
  \item \textbf{Shin all-clips telemetry}: IQData001-IQData080 (n=80), window 0:128.
  \item \textbf{Shin motion subset}: IQData001-005, IQData010, IQData020, IQData040, IQData060, IQData080 (n=10).
  \item \textbf{Mace holdout split (deduplicated)}: train: scan1/2 + scan3/6; test: scan4 + scan5.
  \item \textbf{Gammex flow phantom structural ROC (along-linear17)}: frames 0:85 (n=85), PRF=2500 Hz, N=17 shots.
  \item \textbf{Gammex flow phantom structural ROC (across-linear17)}: frames 0:200 (n=200), PRF=2500 Hz, N=17 shots.
  \item \textbf{Gammex flow phantom within-ensemble motion ladder}: along-linear17, frames 0:85, amps 0..2 px, kinds {rw,step}.
  \item \textbf{Twinkling calculi KA hygiene}: calcifications sequence, frames 0:50 (n=50), PRF approx 500 Hz, N=9 shots.
  \item \textbf{ULM 7883227 baseline sweep}: blocks 1-3, frames 0:128, MC-SVD energy-frac sweep (label-free).
  \item \textbf{ULM 7883227 motion sweeps}: blocks 1-3, frames 0:128, frozen baseline e=0.975, motion kinds {brainlike,elastic}.
\end{itemize}

\paragraph{Artifact commands.}
Each entry below lists the command(s) used to regenerate the referenced paper artifact(s). Most scripts write a JSON summary containing the full parameterization and are safe to rerun.
\begin{enumerate}[label=(R\arabic*),nosep]
  \item \textbf{PD-mode sanity checks (PD-mode map and score S=PD)}
    (paper refs: Notation (PD convention)).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{pd_mode_sanity/ (optional figs)}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Run on any generated acceptance bundle root containing pw\_* directories.
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/pd_mode_sanity.py \
  runs/<bundle_root>/pw_* \
  --out-dir reports/pd_mode_sanity
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Conditional STAP leakage ablation (full vs conditional masks)}
    (paper refs: Results (Brain-k-Wave): conditional STAP ablation).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{condstap_leakage.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{condstap_leakage.json}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/conditional_stap_leakage_ablation.py \
  --pilots runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed1 runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed2 \
  --profile Brain-OpenSkull \
  --out-root runs/ablation/condstap_leakage \
  --window-length 64 --window-offset 0 --disjoint-offset 64 \
  --summary-csv reports/condstap_leakage.csv \
  --summary-json reports/condstap_leakage.json
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Brain-* baseline fairness: MC--SVD(e) tune-once sweep}
    (paper refs: Baseline fairness (Brain-*)).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep_seed1.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep_seed1.json}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep.py \
  --pilot runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed1 \
  --profile Brain-OpenSkull \
  --out-root runs/sweep/mcsvd_energy_brain_seed1 \
  --window-length 64 --window-offset 0 \
  --energy-fracs 0.90,0.95,0.97,0.975,0.98,0.99 \
  --fprs 1e-4,3e-4,1e-3 \
  --summary-csv reports/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep_seed1.csv \
  --summary-json reports/brain_mcsvd_energy_sweep_seed1.json
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Brain-* ROC curve figure (median+IQR over disjoint windows)}
    (paper refs: Figure: \path{brain_kwave_roc_curves.pdf}).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{brain_kwave_roc_curves.pdf}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Reads precomputed per-window score/mask arrays under runs/pilot/fair\_filter\_matrix\_full\_clinical\_cpu\_v2.
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/fig_brain_kwave_roc_curves.py \
  --runs-root runs/pilot/fair_filter_matrix_full_clinical_cpu_v2 \
  --out-pdf figs/paper/brain_kwave_roc_curves.pdf
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Brain-* cross-window threshold-transfer audit (STAP)}
    (paper refs: Appendix: cross-window threshold calibration audit (Brain-*)).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{brain_crosswindow_calibration.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{brain_crosswindow_calibration_summary.json}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{brain_crosswindow_calibration_table.tex}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Calibrates thresholds on one 64-frame window's negatives and evaluates on disjoint windows (ordered pairs).
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/brain_crosswindow_calibration.py \
  --runs-root runs/pilot/fair_filter_matrix_full_clinical_cpu_v2 \
  --alphas 1e-4,3e-4,1e-3 \
  --out-csv reports/brain_crosswindow_calibration.csv \
  --out-json reports/brain_crosswindow_calibration_summary.json
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Knowledge-aided prior falsifiability ablation (STAP-only vs contract vs forced)}
    (paper refs: KA evaluation discipline).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{ka_v2_ablation.csv}

    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/ka_contract_v2_ablation.py \
  --pilot runs/pilot/r4c_kwave_hab_contract_seed2 \
  --profile Brain-AliasContract \
  --out-root runs/ablation/ka_v2_falsifiability \
  --stap-device cpu \
  --window-length 64 \
  --window-offsets 0 64 128 192 256 \
  --summary-csv reports/ka_v2_ablation.csv \
  --summary-json reports/ka_v2_ablation.json
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Knowledge-aided prior positive-control ablation (OpenSkull shallow-alias + high-rank ghosts)}
    (paper refs: KA evaluation discipline (positive control)).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{ka_v2_ablation_openskull_shallowalias_}\allowbreak\path{e50.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{ka_v2_ablation_openskull_shallowalias_}\allowbreak\path{e50.json}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Synthetic, replay-only KA-positive regime used as a contract-mechanics positive control; not a realism benchmark.
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/ka_contract_v2_ablation.py \
  --pilot runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed1 \
  --profile Brain-OpenSkull \
  --out-root runs/ablation/openskull_shallowalias_e50 \
  --stap-device cpu \
  --window-length 64 \
  --window-offsets 0 64 128 192 256 \
  --summary-csv reports/ka_v2_ablation_openskull_shallowalias_e50.csv \
  --summary-json reports/ka_v2_ablation_openskull_shallowalias_e50.json \
  --replay-extra \
    --svd-energy-frac 0.50 \
    --flow-doppler-min-hz 60 --flow-doppler-max-hz 180 \
    --flow-doppler-noise-amp 60 --flow-doppler-noise-mode fft_band \
    --bg-alias-hz 650 --bg-alias-fraction 0.7 \
    --bg-alias-depth-min-frac 0.12 --bg-alias-depth-max-frac 0.28 \
    --bg-alias-jitter-hz 35 \
    --flow-mask-suppress-alias-depth \
    --clutter-beta 1.0 --clutter-snr-db 20 \
    --clutter-depth-min-frac 0.20 --clutter-depth-max-frac 0.95 \
    --aperture-phase-std 0.8 --aperture-phase-corr-len 14 \
    --bg-alias-highrank-mode gw_reverb_add \
    --bg-alias-highrank-coverage 0.3 --bg-alias-highrank-amp 0.3 \
    --bg-alias-highrank-margin-px 3 \
    --bg-alias-highrank-freq-jitter-hz 25 \
    --bg-alias-highrank-drift-step-hz 12 \
    --bg-alias-highrank-pf-leak-eta 0.0 \
    --ka-score-contract-v2-mode auto
\end{verbatim}
}

{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
# Sample Brain-* replay bundles (write meta.json with ka_contract_v2 telemetry):
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/replay_stap_from_run.py \
  --src runs/pilot/r4_kwave_seed1 \
  --out runs/telemetry_regime_compare/brain_open_seed1 \
  --profile Brain-OpenSkull \
  --time-window-length 64 \
  --time-window-offset 0 --time-window-offset 64 --time-window-offset 128 \
  --time-window-offset 192 --time-window-offset 256

  --src runs/pilot/r4c_kwave_hab_contract_seed2_v2 \
  --out runs/telemetry_regime_compare/brain_aliascontract_seed2 \
  --profile Brain-AliasContract \
  --time-window-length 64 \
  --time-window-offset 0 --time-window-offset 64 --time-window-offset 128 \
  --time-window-offset 192 --time-window-offset 256
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/replay_stap_from_run.py \
  --src runs/pilot/r4c_kwave_hab_v3_skull_seed2_v2 \
  --out runs/telemetry_regime_compare/brain_skullor_seed2 \
  --profile Brain-SkullOR \
  --time-window-length 64 \
  --time-window-offset 0 --time-window-offset 64 --time-window-offset 128 \
  --time-window-offset 192 --time-window-offset 256

# Generate the overlay histogram figure:
# (reads Shin bundles and Mace CSV from other artifacts)
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/telemetry_regime_compare_fig.py \
  --out-png figs/paper/telemetry_regime_compare.png
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Shin brainlike motion sweep (10 clips) + aggregate plots}
    Paper refs:
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item Table: Shin motion endpoints
      \item Figure: \path{shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.png}
      \item Figure: \path{shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png}
      \item Figure: \path{shin_motion_brainlike_compare.png}
    \end{itemize}
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U/*.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.csv}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.png}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{shin_motion_brainlike_compare.png}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Window-specific batch runs (64:192, 122:250) follow the same pattern.
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
# Per-clip sweeps (canonical window 0:128; KA disabled):
for f in IQData{001,002,003,004,005,010,020,040,060,080}.dat; do
  PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_motion_sweep \
    --iq-file "$f" --frames 0:128 --profile U --svd-energy-frac 0.97 \
    --motion-kind brainlike --amp-px-list 0,0.5,1,2 \
    --no-score-ka-v2 --out-root runs/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U \
    --out-csv "reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U/${f%.dat}.csv" \
    --out-png "reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U/${f%.dat}.png";
done

# Aggregate curve (writes CSV + plot):
PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_motion_aggregate \
  --in-dir reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U \
  --out-csv reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.csv \
  --out-png reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.png

# Compare across windows / reg ablations (writes comparison plots):
PYTHONPATH=. python -m scripts.shin_ratbrain_motion_compare \
  --curve "0:128=reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_agg.csv" \
  --curve "64:192=reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_f64_192_reg1_agg.csv" \
  --curve "122:250=reports/shin_motion_brainlike_batch_U_f122_250_reg1_agg.csv" \
  --out-png reports/shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png
cp -f \
  reports/shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png \
  figs/paper/shin_motion_brainlike_compare_reg1.png
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Gammex flow phantom structural ROC (along-linear17, PRF=2500)}
    Paper refs:
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item Twinkling section: Table (structural ROC)
      \item Figure: \path{twinkling_gammex_along_mask_overlay.png}
    \end{itemize}
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{runs/real/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_}\allowbreak\path{msd_ka/}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_}\allowbreak\path{msd_ka_with_baselines.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_}\allowbreak\path{msd_ka_with_baselines_summary.json}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_along_mask_overlay.png}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Along-linear uses stride 6; this matches the fixed geometry-only stride policy (largest stride with >=500 tiles).
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
SEQ_DIR="data/twinkling_artifact/Flow in Gammex phantom"
SEQ_DIR="$SEQ_DIR/Flow in Gammex phantom (along - linear probe)"
OUT_ROOT="runs/real/twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_msd_ka"
MASK_GLOB=$OUT_ROOT/*__mask_debug

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_make_bundles.py \
  --seq-dir "$SEQ_DIR" \
  --out-root "$OUT_ROOT" \
  --frames 0:85 \
  --prf-hz 2500 --Lt 16 \
  --tile-hw 8 8 --tile-stride 6 \
  --cov-estimator tyler_pca --diag-load 0.07 \
  --baseline-type svd_bandpass --svd-keep-min 2 --svd-keep-max 17 \
  --score-mode msd --score-ka-v2-enable --score-ka-v2-mode auto

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_eval_structural.py \
  --root "$OUT_ROOT" \
  --out-csv reports/twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_msd_ka_with_baselines.csv \
  --out-summary-json \
    reports/twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_msd_ka_with_baselines_summary.json

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/fig_twinkling_mask_overlay.py \
  --bmode $MASK_GLOB/bmode_roi_ref_norm.png \
  --mask-flow $MASK_GLOB/mask_flow.png \
  --mask-bg $MASK_GLOB/mask_bg.png \
  --out figs/paper/twinkling_gammex_along_mask_overlay.png \
  --min-width 1200 --dpi 300
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Gammex flow phantom structural ROC (across-linear17, PRF=2500)}
    Paper refs:
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item Twinkling section: Table (structural ROC)
      \item Figure: \path{twinkling_gammex_across_mask_overlay.png}
    \end{itemize}
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{runs/real/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_across17_prf2500_str4_msd_}\allowbreak\path{ka/}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_across17_prf2500_str4_msd_}\allowbreak\path{ka_with_baselines.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_across17_prf2500_str4_msd_}\allowbreak\path{ka_with_baselines_summary.json}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_across_mask_overlay.png}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Across-linear uses stride 4; this matches the fixed geometry-only stride policy (largest stride with >=500 tiles).
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
SEQ_DIR="data/twinkling_artifact/Flow in Gammex phantom"
SEQ_DIR="$SEQ_DIR/Flow in Gammex phantom (across - linear probe)"
DAT_PATH="$SEQ_DIR/RawBCFCine_08062017_145434_17.dat"
PAR_PATH="$SEQ_DIR/RawBCFCine_08062017_145434_17.par"
OUT_ROOT="runs/real/twinkling_gammex_across17_prf2500_str4_msd_ka"
MASK_GLOB=$OUT_ROOT/*__mask_debug

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_make_bundles.py \
  --seq-dir "$SEQ_DIR" \
  --dat-path "$DAT_PATH" \
  --par-path "$PAR_PATH" \
  --out-root "$OUT_ROOT" \
  --frames 0:200 \
  --prf-hz 2500 --Lt 16 \
  --tile-hw 8 8 --tile-stride 4 \
  --cov-estimator tyler_pca --diag-load 0.07 \
  --baseline-type svd_bandpass --svd-keep-min 2 --svd-keep-max 17 \
  --score-mode msd --score-ka-v2-enable --score-ka-v2-mode auto

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_eval_structural.py \
  --root "$OUT_ROOT" \
  --out-csv reports/twinkling_gammex_across17_prf2500_str4_msd_ka_with_baselines.csv \
  --out-summary-json \
    reports/twinkling_gammex_across17_prf2500_str4_msd_ka_with_baselines_summary.json

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/fig_twinkling_mask_overlay.py \
  --bmode $MASK_GLOB/bmode_roi_ref_norm.png \
  --mask-flow $MASK_GLOB/mask_flow.png \
  --mask-bg $MASK_GLOB/mask_bg.png \
  --out figs/paper/twinkling_gammex_across_mask_overlay.png \
  --min-width 780 --dpi 300
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Gammex within-ensemble motion ladder (along-linear17; PRF=2500)}
    Paper refs:
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item Twinkling section: Figure (within-ensemble motion ladder)
      \item Figure: \path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_within_ensemble_motion_ladder_rw_ci_v2.png}
      \item Figure: \path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_within_ensemble_motion_ladder_step_ci_v2.png}
    \end{itemize}
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{runs/real/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_}\allowbreak\path{within_ensemble_motion_rw_v2/}
      \item \path{runs/real/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_}\allowbreak\path{within_ensemble_motion_step_v2/}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_}\allowbreak\path{within_ensemble_motion_ladder_rw_ci_v2.json}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_}\allowbreak\path{within_ensemble_motion_ladder_step_ci_}\allowbreak\path{v2.json}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_}\allowbreak\path{within_ensemble_motion_ladder_rw_ci_v2.png}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_}\allowbreak\path{within_ensemble_motion_ladder_step_ci_v2.png}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
SEQ_DIR="data/twinkling_artifact/Flow in Gammex phantom"
SEQ_DIR="$SEQ_DIR/Flow in Gammex phantom (along - linear probe)"
REF_ROOT="runs/real/twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_msd_nomotion_ref_fast_f020"
OUT_RW="runs/real/twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_within_ensemble_motion_rw_v2"
OUT_STEP="runs/real/twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_within_ensemble_motion_step_v2"
REP_DIR="reports"
FIG_DIR="figs/paper"
BASE="twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500"
SUF_RW="within_ensemble_motion_ladder_rw_ci_v2"
SUF_STEP="within_ensemble_motion_ladder_step_ci_v2"
RW_PREFIX="$REP_DIR/${BASE}_${SUF_RW}"
STEP_PREFIX="$REP_DIR/${BASE}_${SUF_STEP}"
RW_FIG="$FIG_DIR/${BASE}_${SUF_RW}.png"
STEP_FIG="$FIG_DIR/${BASE}_${SUF_STEP}.png"

# Amp=0 reference bundles for equivalence checks (20 frames):
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_make_bundles.py \
  --seq-dir "$SEQ_DIR" \
  --out-root "$REF_ROOT" \
  --frames 0:20 \
  --prf-hz 2500 --Lt 16 \
  --tile-hw 8 8 --tile-stride 6 \
  --cov-estimator tyler_pca --diag-load 0.07 \
  --baseline-type svd_bandpass --svd-keep-min 2 --svd-keep-max 17 \
  --score-mode msd

# Within-ensemble motion sweeps (85 frames; rw and step):
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_gammex_within_ensemble_motion_sweep.py \
  --seq-dir "$SEQ_DIR" \
  --out-root "$OUT_RW" \
  --frames 0:85 --mask-ref-frames 0:20 \
  --prf-hz 2500 --Lt 16 \
  --tile-hw 8 8 --tile-stride 6 \
  --cov-estimator tyler_pca --diag-load 0.07 \
  --baseline-type svd_bandpass --svd-keep-min 2 --svd-keep-max 17 \
  --score-mode msd \
  --motion-kind rw --amp-px-list 0,0.25,0.5,1,1.5,2
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_gammex_within_ensemble_motion_sweep.py \
  --seq-dir "$SEQ_DIR" \
  --out-root "$OUT_STEP" \
  --frames 0:85 --mask-ref-frames 0:20 \
  --prf-hz 2500 --Lt 16 \
  --tile-hw 8 8 --tile-stride 6 \
  --cov-estimator tyler_pca --diag-load 0.07 \
  --baseline-type svd_bandpass --svd-keep-min 2 --svd-keep-max 17 \
  --score-mode msd \
  --motion-kind step --amp-px-list 0,0.25,0.5,1,1.5,2

# Aggregate + bootstrap CIs + plots:
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_eval_motion_ladder.py \
  --root "$OUT_RW" \
  --out-csv "${RW_PREFIX}.csv" \
  --out-json "${RW_PREFIX}.json" \
  --out-png "$RW_FIG" \
  --bootstrap 1000 --bootstrap-seed 0 \
  --amp0-ref-root "$REF_ROOT" \
  --amp0-ref-frames 0:20 --amp0-ref-tol 5e-3
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_eval_motion_ladder.py \
  --root "$OUT_STEP" \
  --out-csv "${STEP_PREFIX}.csv" \
  --out-json "${STEP_PREFIX}.json" \
  --out-png "$STEP_FIG" \
  --bootstrap 1000 --bootstrap-seed 0 \
  --amp0-ref-root "$REF_ROOT" \
  --amp0-ref-frames 0:20 --amp0-ref-tol 5e-3
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Twinkling calculi KA hygiene + contract telemetry (calcifications; PRF approx 500)}
    Paper refs:
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item Twinkling section: KA hygiene on calculi
      \item Figure: \path{twinkling_calculi_tail_example.png}
    \end{itemize}
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{runs/real/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_calculi_calcifications_prf500_}\allowbreak\path{str4_Lt8_msd_ka_scm_dl015_f050/}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_calculi_calcifications_prf500_}\allowbreak\path{str4_Lt8_msd_ka_scm_dl015_f050_roc.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_calculi_calcifications_prf500_}\allowbreak\path{str4_Lt8_msd_ka_scm_dl015_f050_summary.json}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
    Notes: Calculi runs use proxy masks (not tube structural masks). Used for contract/tail-hygiene instrumentation (not clinical detection claims).
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
BASE_DIR="data/twinkling_artifact/Twinkling artifact on calculi"
SEQ_DIR="$BASE_DIR/Twinkling and Flash artifacts on artificial calculi"
RUN_TAG="twinkling_calculi_calcifications_prf500_str4_Lt8_msd_ka_scm_dl015_f050"
OUT_ROOT="runs/real/${RUN_TAG}"
REP_PREFIX="reports/${RUN_TAG}"

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_make_bundles.py \
  --seq-dir "$SEQ_DIR" \
  --out-root "$OUT_ROOT" \
  --frames 0:50 \
  --prf-hz 500 --Lt 8 \
  --tile-hw 8 8 --tile-stride 4 \
  --cov-estimator scm --diag-load 0.15 \
  --baseline-type svd_bandpass --svd-keep-min 2 --svd-keep-max 9 \
  --score-mode msd --score-ka-v2-enable --score-ka-v2-mode auto \
  --mask-mode none

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_eval_structural.py \
  --root "$OUT_ROOT" \
  --out-csv "${REP_PREFIX}_roc.csv" \
  --out-summary-json "${REP_PREFIX}_summary.json"
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Twinkling contract figure pack (states/reasons + calculi tail example)}
    Paper refs:
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item Twinkling section: Figure (twinkling\_contract\_states\_reasons.png)
      \item Twinkling section: Figure (twinkling\_calculi\_tail\_example.png)
    \end{itemize}
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_contract_states_reasons.png}
      \item \path{figs/paper/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_calculi_tail_example.png}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{twinkling_contract_figpack.json}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
ALONG_BASE="twinkling_gammex_alonglinear17_prf2500_str6_msd_ka_with_baselines"
ACROSS_BASE="twinkling_gammex_across17_prf2500_str4_msd_ka_with_baselines"
ALONG_SUM="reports/${ALONG_BASE}_summary.json"
ACROSS_SUM="reports/${ACROSS_BASE}_summary.json"
CALC_TAG="twinkling_calculi_calcifications_prf500_str4_Lt8_msd_ka_scm_dl015_f050"
CALC_SUM="reports/${CALC_TAG}_summary.json"
CALC_ROOT="runs/real/${CALC_TAG}"
OUT_STATE="figs/paper/twinkling_contract_states_reasons.png"
OUT_EX="figs/paper/twinkling_calculi_tail_example.png"
OUT_JSON="reports/twinkling_contract_figpack.json"

PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/twinkling_contract_figpack.py \
  --along-summary "$ALONG_SUM" \
  --across-summary "$ACROSS_SUM" \
  --calculi-summary "$CALC_SUM" \
  --calculi-root "$CALC_ROOT" \
  --out-state-reason-png "$OUT_STATE" \
  --out-calculi-example-png "$OUT_EX" \
  --out-json "$OUT_JSON"
\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{ULM 7883227 one-time baseline sweep (MC-SVD energy fraction)}
    (paper refs: ULM section: baseline calibration (frozen svd\_energy\_frac=0.975)).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{runs/real/}\allowbreak\path{ulm7883227_baseline_mcsvd_energy_sweep_ULM_}\allowbreak\path{0000_0128/}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{ulm7883227_baseline_mcsvd_energy_sweep_ULM_}\allowbreak\path{0000_0128.csv}
      \item \path{reports/}\allowbreak\path{ulm7883227_baseline_mcsvd_energy_sweep_ULM_}\allowbreak\path{0000_0128.json}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/ulm_zenodo_7883227_baseline_sweep.py \
  --block-ids 1,2,3 --frames 0:128 \
  --svd-energy-frac-list 0.90,0.95,0.97,0.975,0.98,0.99 \
  --profile ULM --prf-hz 1000 --Lt 64 \
  --tile-h 8 --tile-w 8 --tile-stride 3 \
  --reg-enable --reg-subpixel 4 \
  --no-run-stap --bg-tail-fpr 0.001 --stability-split \
  --cache-dir tmp/ulm_zenodo_7883227 \
  --out-root runs/real/ulm7883227_baseline_mcsvd_energy_sweep_ULM_0000_0128 \
  --out-csv reports/ulm7883227_baseline_mcsvd_energy_sweep_ULM_0000_0128.csv \
  --out-json reports/ulm7883227_baseline_mcsvd_energy_sweep_ULM_0000_0128.json
\end{verbatim}
}

{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/ulm_zenodo_7883227_motion_sweep.py \
  --block-ids 1,2,3 --frames 0:128 \
  --profile ULM --prf-hz 1000 --Lt 64 \
  --tile-h 8 --tile-w 8 --tile-stride 3 \
  --baseline-type mc_svd --svd-energy-frac 0.975 \
  --reg-enable --reg-subpixel 4 \
  --cov-estimator scm --diag-load 0.07 \

  --out-root runs/real/ulm7883227_motion_sweep_ULM_brainlike_e975 \
  --out-csv reports/ulm7883227_motion_sweep_ULM_blocks1_3_0000_0128_brainlike_e975.csv \
  --out-json reports/ulm7883227_motion_sweep_ULM_blocks1_3_0000_0128_brainlike_e975.json \
  --out-png figs/paper/ulm7883227_motion_sweep_ULM_blocks1_3_0000_0128_brainlike_e975.png
PYTHONPATH=. python scripts/ulm_zenodo_7883227_motion_sweep.py \
  --block-ids 1,2,3 --frames 0:128 \
  --profile ULM --prf-hz 1000 --Lt 64 \
  --tile-h 8 --tile-w 8 --tile-stride 3 \
  --baseline-type mc_svd --svd-energy-frac 0.975 \
  --reg-enable --reg-subpixel 4 \
  --cov-estimator scm --diag-load 0.07 \
  --motion-kind elastic --amp-px-list 0,0.5,1,2,3 \
  --out-root runs/real/ulm7883227_motion_sweep_ULM_elastic_e975 \

\end{verbatim}
}

  \item \textbf{Paper build modes (paper vs supplement vs full)}
    (paper refs: Build packaging (Phase 7)).
    Outputs:
    \begingroup\raggedright
    \begin{itemize}[nosep,leftmargin=0em,label={}]
      \item \path{stap_fus_paper.pdf}
      \item \path{stap_fus_supplement.pdf}
      \item \path{stap_fus_methodology.pdf}
    \end{itemize}
    \endgroup
{\footnotesize
\begin{verbatim}
pdflatex stap_fus_methodology.tex   # full (default)
pdflatex stap_fus_paper.tex         # paper-only (no appendices)
pdflatex stap_fus_supplement.tex    # supplement-only (appendices only)
\end{verbatim}
}

\end{enumerate}
